title: Access monday's native UI components via SDK

posts.author: edicezar.nanni (Edi Nanni)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m new to monday.com app development and I have a question: is it possible to access monday’s native UI components via the SDK or another supported mechanism?

For example, I want to create a helper board item menu app that retrieves information from the item on a board, opens the item card, and inserts this information (as a pre-formatted text) into the text field of a new Update. So far, I’ve been able to retrieve the information via the API and open the item card in the Update tab. Now I need to be able to insert the text in the new update text box.
